examples: They have simply followed each other in reporting an untruth.
It is very hard for the employer to prove they have lost confidence in someone because of the initial untruth.
As she stood in front of her 5th grade class on the very first day of school, Mrs. Thompson told the children an untruth.
This is also about whether the university has an obligation, moral or otherwise to dispel pervasive untruth.
How can an untruth, ever prove another lie, to be in error?
